---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# AgeFromDentition

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/MU-CGCS/AgeFromDentition/workflows/R-CMD-check/badge.svg)](https://github.com/MU-CGCS/AgeFromDentition/actions)
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of `AgeFromDentition` is to estimate dental age from scores of dental development.

## Installation

You can install the development version of AgeFromDentition from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("MU-CGCS/AgeFromDentition")
```
